name: @borjie/language-self-improve
description: Wave 19K — Language Self-Improvement Loop. Mr. Mwikila's Swahili gets better over time per tenant. Capture (consent-gated by 19J ambient-listener) → score on 4 axes (WER, PER, grammar, terminology) → curate (active-learning bias, PII-redact) → train (LoRA adapter or rag-prefix) → eval against 200-entry extended gauntlet + per-tenant additions → promote/rollback by deltas → hook to Wave 19C RLVR as a verifier emission. See Docs/DESIGN/LANGUAGE_SELF_IMPROVE_SPEC.md.
